name: forgeailab
description: ForgeAILab Claude Code plugins. spark = the board-driven AI MVP workflow (planner / implementer / evaluator skills over a docs/spark spec workspace).

plugins.name: spark
plugins.description: spark's 21-skill workflow: /spark:start plans a docs/spark spec workspace (proposal + visual design + EARS specs + tasks.md), /spark:build-loop builds toward the spec scenarios, /spark:capture-feedback turns live feedback into tasks, plus the full pipeline and pack tooling.
